title: Workshop: Build an Accessible Service-Status Icon
summary: Workshop: Build an Accessible Service-Status Icon uses an original service status icon build scenario to retrieve earlier HTML skills, add a bounded artifact layer, and verify transfer with source and browser evidence.
objectives: Retrieve html svg without step-by-step imitation.
Produce and verify a real service status icon build artifact or evidence report.
Preserve earlier valid requirements while diagnosing changed content and constraints.
